top_signals.title: Prabowo’s Biggest Crackdown on Tycoons Shocked His Own Officials
top_signals.summary: In early May, President Prabowo Subianto summoned a handful of his most trusted advisers to his house in south Jakarta to discuss how to find more revenue as surging oil prices stretched Indonesia’s finances.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
